context_text: <B> and then my dad flies a lot and it makes me nervous because i mean i really don't think they're going to do it on a plane again / <A> oh / <B> i but i was so scared that the plane like maybe that day because they had some other flights but / <A> okay / <B> and then your emails you know they get bombarded with this is the end of the world friday the thirteenth the end of the world because this is what's happening and then you start freaking out oh my god like it's the end of the world because nostradamus predicted this you know / <A> okay / <B> all these crazy emails and i'm just glad that i you know i wasn't in that city cause i don't know what i would of done { you } / <A> [ mhm ]
